items.desc_zh: 胡塞武装表示，禁运立即开始，是对沙特封锁也门港口和机场的回应。

items.title_en: Notorious drug cartel leader Ismael Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
items.title_zh: 臭名昭著的贩毒集团头目伊斯梅尔·赞巴达在美国监狱被判处终身监禁
items.desc_en: Known as "El Mayo", the co-founder the Sinaloa Cartel was also ordered to pay $15bn after he admitted to sending vast amounts of drugs to the US.
items.desc_zh: 被称为“El Mayo”的锡那罗亚贩毒集团联合创始人在承认向美国运送大量毒品后也被勒令支付 150 亿美元。

items.title_en: Ofcom unable to take further legal action against suicide forum
items.title_zh: Ofcom 无法对自杀论坛采取进一步的法律行动
items.desc_en: The regulator said it had "no further legal routes available" under the Online Safety Act.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，根据《在线安全法》，“没有其他可用的合法途径”。

items.title_en: Ten killed as Russian attacks on merchant ships in Black Sea intensify
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯加强对黑海商船的袭击造成十人死亡
items.desc_en: Russian strikes on the Odesa region have killed 28 people in July alone, local authorities say.
items.desc_zh: 地方当局称，仅 7 月份，俄罗斯对敖德萨地区的袭击就造成 28 人死亡。

items.title_en: Hamas names Khalil al-Hayya as new overall leader
items.title_zh: 哈马斯任命哈利勒·哈亚为新任总领导人
items.desc_en: The Palestinian armed group's Qatar-based chief negotiator replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by Israeli forces in Gaza in 2024.
items.desc_zh: 巴勒斯坦武装组织驻卡塔尔的首席谈判代表接替了 2024 年在加沙被以色列军队杀害的叶海亚·辛瓦尔 (Yahya Sinwar)。

items.title_en: AliExpress fined record €550m by EU for allowing sale of illegal goods
items.title_zh: 全球速卖通因允许销售非法商品而被欧盟罚款创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元
items.desc_en: The Chinese retailer allowed unsafe toys and counterfeit clothes to be sold on its site, says the EU.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟表示，这家中国零售商允许在其网站上销售不安全的玩具和假冒服装。

items.title_en: Rare identical quadruplets born in Australia
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚诞生罕见同卵四胞胎
items.desc_en: The parents of the four naturally-conceived girls were taken by "immense surprise" with the pregnancy, the hospital said.
items.desc_zh: 医院表示，这四名自然受孕女孩的父母对怀孕感到“非常惊讶”。

items.title_en: Boy, 13, dies during World Cup celebrations in Spain
items.title_zh: 13岁男孩在西班牙世界杯庆祝活动中去世
items.desc_en: Two other young people were injured after a fountain partially collapsed in Salamanca's Ciudad Rodrigo.
items.desc_zh: 萨拉曼卡罗德里戈城一座喷泉部分倒塌，另外两名年轻人受伤。

items.desc_zh: 将任何网站克隆为干净的代码。免费和开源

items.title_en: Ferry carrying 116 passengers sinks off Guyana coast, authorities say
items.title_zh: 当局称载有116名乘客的渡轮在圭亚那海岸沉没
items.desc_en: Eight passengers have so far been rescued after the vessel capsized between Georgetown and Port Kaituma.
items.desc_zh: 乔治敦和凯图马港之间的船只倾覆后，迄今为止已有八名乘客获救。

items.title_en: China's Moonshot AI claims Kimi K3 can rival OpenAI and Anthropic
items.title_zh: 中国的Moonshot AI声称Kimi K3可以与OpenAI和Anthropic相媲美
items.desc_en: The company has unveiled a massive new artificial intelligence model it says can take on top American firms.
items.desc_zh: 该公司推出了一个大规模的新人工智能模型，据称可以与美国顶尖公司抗衡。

items.title_en: Trump Media to sell early access to key social posts
items.title_zh: 特朗普媒体将出售对关键社交帖子的早期访问权
items.desc_en: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed of the its social posts for Wall Street traders.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普媒体正在为华尔街交易员推出快速、付费的社交帖子。

items.title_en: Tidy
items.title_zh: Tidy
items.desc_en: Rename files automatically to tidy your mac
items.desc_zh: 自动重命名文件以整理您的 Mac

items.title_en: Teen hackers who live streamed cyber-attack on TfL jailed
items.title_zh: 直播伦敦交通局网络攻击的青少年黑客被判入狱
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
items.title_zh: TikTok 因儿童年龄检查面临 Ofcom 调查
items.desc_en: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.
items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.desc_zh: 用你的声音控制工作。工作用的 Siri。

items.title_en: SpaceX share price drops below stock market debut
items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价跌破上市首日价
items.desc_en: Share trading in Elon Musk’s rocket company has been volatile since it went public a month ago.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克的火箭公司自一个月前上市以来，其股票交易一直波动较大。

items.title_en: Midnight social media curfew proposed for UK teens aged 16 and 17
items.title_zh: 英国提议对 16 岁和 17 岁青少年实行午夜社交媒体宵禁
items.desc_en: The government says it will improve teenagers' lives but campaigners call it a "missed opportunity".
items.desc_zh: 政府表示这将改善青少年的生活，但活动人士称这是“错失的机会”。

items.desc_zh: 外科医生在手术室中远程控制两个类人机器人。

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。
